riverton healthbank, inc. — cyber operations update for investor-relations q&a (us issuer; listed on the national growth exchange; reg fd awareness).
as previously announced on 2026-05-04 via press release, we detected anomalous traffic at our third-party billing gateway operated by pinecrest data works, ltd.
per current forensics, no patient health information protected under hipaa and no glba customer data were accessed; affected logs show invalid id patterns such as ssn 000-00-0000 and acct ****-****-1234z.
service availability impact was under 11 minutes during off-peak hours and is not expected to be material to operations; no mac/mae has been triggered under any vendor or customer agreement.
public-source guidance followed: fcac ransomware checklist and ohpo bulletin on third-party trackers; references to those materials are posted on our website security page.
we filed a routine incident notice with state oversight offices and notified impacted clinics via role mailbox notice@rivertonhealthbank.example and the public help page at help.rhb.example/incident.
lowercase pm notes: backlog item rhb-sec-2041 to complete token rotation; dry run completed in sandbox.
analyst relations will keep responses limited to already-published facts and safe harbor language; no selective disclosure to covered market actors is permitted.
embargo until 2026-06-20 14:00 et for the refreshed faq posting on our ir page, per calendar shared internally.
for completeness, we executed a definitive services addendum with pinecrest on 2026-05-01 to enable mfa enforcement, and that addendum was referenced in the form 8-k already on file.
customer communications reference general consumer protection guidance; all statistics use ranges and do not include account numbers, birth dates, or any unique identifiers.
esg angle: we are adding a quarterly tabletop with the board risk committee and posting a plain-language cyber hygiene pledge consistent with usmb health care delivery metrics.
ops note: vendor pen-test window 02:00–05:00 et 2026-06-22; no downtime expected; page-ups only.
unrelated wellness reminder: the staff spa day remains scheduled for friday; please avoid bringing devices into treatment areas.
